name: Horizon Hydraulics
message: Horizon Hydraulics is a full line hydraulic and pneumatic service center. They work across a wide array of industries and their services include both industrial and mobile hydraulics. Horizon Hydraulics is based in Oklahoma City, OK. Their experienced team of professionals is committed to providing the best fluid power solutions. We have a thorough process of diagnostic evaluation. Providing the right solutions for hydraulic maintenance and repair is not easy.  They have been providing our customers with the right solutions since 1983.
